name: Firefly III Importer
description: Import your transactions into Firefly III
compose:
name: slashnode-firefly-iii-importer
services:
  importer:
    image: fireflyiii/data-importer:version-2.3.2
    container_name: firefly-iii-importer
    restart: unless-stopped
    networks:
      - slashnode
    environment:
      FIREFLY_III_URL: http://firefly-iii-server:8080
      VANITY_URL: http://${node.exports.host}:30009
    ports:
      - 127.0.0.1:30010:8080
networks:
  slashnode:
    external: true
